description: Composition White shirt made of 100% combed cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with mid arm button tabs, full front buttoned placket, two patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, buttoned flaps on the shoulders, stitch detailing, branding embroidered on the left pocket and a curved hem Fit Slim Wash care Hand or machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This classic white shirt from scullers adds a big dose of style to your casual look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this shirt, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and casual footwear. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
